title: Senior Doctor - Natco Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Natco Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Natco Pharma in Indore offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Natco Pharma:
Natco Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Natco Pharma!
